TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi sealed beforefieldinit PersistedAssemblyBuilder extends System.Reflection.Emit.AssemblyBuilder
Public NotInheritable Class PersistedAssemblyBuilder Inherits AssemblyBuilder
public ref class PersistedAssemblyBuilder sealed : System::Reflection::Emit::AssemblyBuilder

Docs.summary: Provides an AssemblyBuilder implementation that can persist an assembly to a disk or stream.

MemberSignature.Value: public PersistedAssemblyBuilder (System.Reflection.AssemblyName name, System.Reflection.Assembly coreAssembly, System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<System.Reflection.Emit.CustomAttributeBuilder>? assemblyAttributes = default);

.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class System.Reflection.AssemblyName name, class System.Reflection.Assembly coreAssembly, class System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<class System.Reflection.Emit.CustomAttributeBuilder> assemblyAttributes) cil managed
Public Sub New (name As AssemblyName, coreAssembly As Assembly, Optional assemblyAttributes As IEnumerable(Of CustomAttributeBuilder) = Nothing)

Docs.param: The assembly that denotes the "system assembly" that houses the well-known types such as
A collection that contains the attributes of the assembly.
Docs.summary: Creates a instance that can be saved to a file or stream.
Docs.remarks: Currently the persisted assembly doesn't support running. You must save it and load it back to run.

Attribute.AttributeName: [System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.RequiresDynamicCode("Defining a dynamic assembly requires dynamic code.")]
[<System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.RequiresDynamicCode("Defining a dynamic assembly requires dynamic code.")>]

MemberSignature.Value: Public Overrides ReadOnly Property FullName As String
public: virtual property System::String ^ FullName { System::String ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the display name of the current dynamic assembly.

MemberSignature.Value: public System.Reflection.Metadata.Ecma335.MetadataBuilder GenerateMetadata (out System.Reflection.Metadata.BlobBuilder ilStream, out System.Reflection.Metadata.BlobBuilder mappedFieldData);

.method public hidebysig instance class System.Reflection.Metadata.Ecma335.MetadataBuilder GenerateMetadata([out] class System.Reflection.Metadata.BlobBuilder& ilStream, [out] class System.Reflection.Metadata.BlobBuilder& mappedFieldData) cil managed
Public Function GenerateMetadata (ByRef ilStream As BlobBuilder, ByRef mappedFieldData As BlobBuilder) As MetadataBuilder

Docs.param: When this method returns, contains the bytes that includes all method's IL (body) emitted.
When this method returns, contains the bytes that includes all field RVA data defined in the assembly.
Docs.returns: A that includes all members defined in the Assembly.
Docs.exception: A module is not defined for the assembly.
The metadata was previously populated for the assembly.

Docs.param: When this method returns, contains the bytes that includes all method's IL (body) emitted.

When this method returns, contains the that includes PDB metadata.
Docs.returns: A that includes all members defined in the Assembly.

Docs.param: to get a copied name; to set get the original name.
Docs.summary: Gets the that was specified when the current dynamic assembly was created.
Docs.returns: The name of the dynamic assembly.

public: virtual property System::Reflection::Module ^ ManifestModule { System::Reflection::Module ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the module in the current that contains the assembly manifest.
Docs.remarks: supports only one module per assembly.

Docs.param: The to which the assembly should be serialized.
Docs.summary: Serializes the assembly to the specified stream.

The metadata already populated for the assembly before.
